summaries.title: Dashboard gap closure deployment — SSH via public IP when Tailscale is offline
summaries.summary: When Tailscale is offline on the local machine, SSH via the VPS public IP is a viable fallback since the SSH key works for both Tailscale and public IP access. The deployment script hardcodes the Tailscale IP, so when deploying from an offline Tailscale machine, either use the public IP directly or update the script to try both IPs. Always verify PM2 services are online and the health endpoint returns HTTP 200 after deployment.
